test.name: Abrir Página Robot Framework

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\gestor\\Documents\\GitHub\\digitadorFatura\\browser\\traces\\temp\\8a12e5dc-bfa4-4b5f-bdb9-8e87be9f0a7d"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:8081/
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=/html/body/jhi-main/div[2]/div/jhi-home/div[2]/div/div/div/span[2] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//*[@id="username"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'chantal' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Open Workbook
kw.doc: Open an existing Excel workbook.

kw.name: Read Worksheet As Table
kw.doc: Read the contents of a worksheet into a Table container. Allows sorting/filtering/manipulating using the ``RPA.Tables`` library.

kw.name: Close Workbook
kw.doc: Close the active workbook.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//*[@id="page-heading"]/span[contains(text(), "Compromissos a Pagar- cartao casa bahia ")] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//*[@id="jhi-commitment-heading"][contains(text(), "Criar ou editar Compromisso")] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Split String
kw.doc: Splits the ``string`` using ``separator`` as a delimiter string.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '02/04/2026' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//*[@id="field_valor"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//*[@id="field_valor"] at state editable
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Clear Text
kw.doc: Clears the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '1022.5' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Types the given key combination into element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Focus
kw.doc: Moves focus on to the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'LEROY MERLIN MA' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '0' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//*[@id="field_natureplan"] at state attached
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//*[@id="field_natureplan"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//*[@id="field_natureplan"] at state enabled
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) Manutenções da Casa by attribute SelectAttribute.label from element xpath=//*[@id="field_natureplan"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//*[@id="page-heading"]/span[contains(text(), "Compromissos a Pagar- cartao casa bahia ")] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

iter.var: {'Data': '02/04/2026', 'Descrição': 'LEROY MERLIN MA', 'Valor': 1022.5, 'Categoria': 'Manutenções da Casa', 'Cartão': 'Casas Bahia ', 'CategoriaId': None}

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Este teste abre o site oficial do Robot Framework.
